title: Create e-commerce app for Uttarakhandi willow cricket bats

requirements.text: Create a product catalog displaying Uttarakhandi willow cricket bats with images, descriptions, and specifications
acceptanceCriteria: Product catalog displays multiple bat listings
Each bat shows an image, name, and description
Catalog is responsive and works on mobile and desktop

requirements.text: Display fixed price of ₹600 for all bats in the catalog

quotes: all uttrakhandi willow bats at 600 rupees

acceptanceCriteria: Price of ₹600 is clearly visible for each bat
Currency symbol (₹) is displayed correctly
Price formatting is consistent across all product listings

requirements.text: Store bat product data (name, description, image reference, price) in backend with query and list methods
acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores bat product information persistently
Query method returns list of all available bats
Each bat record includes name, description, image path, and price fields

requirements.text: Implement shopping cart functionality allowing users to add bats and view cart totals
acceptanceCriteria: Users can add bats to cart from product catalog
Cart displays selected items with quantities
Cart shows total price calculation
Users can update quantities or remove items from cart

requirements.text: Create checkout flow capturing customer name, delivery address, and phone number
acceptanceCriteria: Checkout form collects customer name, delivery address, and contact number
Form validation ensures all required fields are filled
Order data is submitted to backend upon checkout completion

requirements.text: Store completed orders in backend with customer details, items purchased, quantities, and total amount
acceptanceCriteria: Backend persists order records with all customer and purchase details
Each order includes timestamp, customer info, items list, and total price
Orders can be retrieved via backend query methods

requirements.text: Apply a creative, traditional Indian marketplace visual theme with warm, earthy colors and elegant typography that reflects the craftsmanship of Uttarakhandi products
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette uses warm, earthy tones inspired by traditional Indian aesthetics
Typography is elegant and readable
Overall design conveys craftsmanship and authenticity
Theme is applied consistently across all pages

requirements.text: Render generated product images for Uttarakhandi willow bats as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated
acceptanceCriteria: Generated bat images are loaded from frontend/public/assets/generated directory
Images are displayed in product catalog
Image paths are correctly referenced in product data

constraints: All bats must be priced at exactly ₹600
Product catalog must focus specifically on Uttarakhandi willow cricket bats
nonGoals: Order status tracking or admin dashboard

required: Hero banner image showing traditional Uttarakhandi willow bat craftsmanship with natural wood texture (hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
Product photo of classic Uttarakhandi willow cricket bat on white background (bat-classic.dim_600x600.png)
Product photo of premium Uttarakhandi willow cricket bat with leather grip (bat-premium.dim_600x600.png)
Product photo of professional grade Uttarakhandi willow cricket bat (bat-professional.dim_600x600.png)
Small icon of cricket bat for cart and navigation (bat-icon.dim_64x64.png)
